    gcc \
    curl \
    git \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy application code
COPY . .

# Set PYTHONPATH to include /app so imports work
ENV PYTHONPATH=/app

# Expose port (Cloud Run sets PORT env var)

# Run n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss Server

#!/bin/bash
set -e

PROJECT_ID=$(gcloud config get-value project)
REGION="us-central1"
SERVICE_NAME="n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss-server"

echo "🚀 Deploying n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss Server to Cloud Run..."
echo "Project: $PROJECT_ID"
echo "Region: $REGION"

# Build image
echo "📦 Building Docker image..."
gcloud builds submit --config cloudbuild_n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss.yaml .

# Deploy to Cloud Run
echo "☁️  Deploying to Cloud Run..."
# Note: We are passing API keys from the current environment.
# Ensure GEMINI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, and XAI_API_KEY are set.

gcloud run deploy $SERVICE_NAME \
    --image us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss/server \
    --platform managed \
    --region $REGION \
    --allow-unauthenticated \
    --set-env-vars="PYTHONPATH=/app" \
    --set-env-vars="GEMINI_API_KEY=${GEMINI_API_KEY}" \
    --set-env-vars="ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY}" \
    --set-env-vars="XAI_API_KEY=${XAI_API_KEY}" \
    --memory=2Gi \
    --cpu=2

echo "✅ Deployment complete!"
echo "🌍 Service URL: $(gcloud run services describe $SERVICE_NAME --platform managed --region $REGION --format 'value(status.url)')"

# Cloud Build configuration for ShadowTagAi Engine
# Cloud Run ONLY Architecture

steps:
  # 1. Build Docker image
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    id: 'build-engine'
    args:
      - 'build'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/shadowtagai-core/engine:latest'
      - '.'

  # 2. Push to Artifact Registry
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    id: 'push-engine'
    args:
      - 'push'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/shadowtagai-core/engine:latest'

  # 3. Deploy to Cloud Run (Service)
  - name: 'gcr.io/google.com/cloudsdktool/cloud-sdk'
    id: 'deploy-cloud-run'
    entrypoint: gcloud
    args:
      - 'run'
      - 'deploy'
      - 'shadowtagai-orchestrator'
      - '--image'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/shadowtagai-core/engine:latest'
      - '--region'
      - 'us-central1'
      - '--platform'
      - 'managed'
      - '--allow-unauthenticated'

images:
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/shadowtagai-core/engine:latest'

options:
  logging: CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY

timeout: '1800s'

# Cloud Build configuration for transcode-service
# Triggers on: push to main with changes in transcode-service/

steps:
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 1: Rust Tests
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'rust:1.82-bookworm'
    id: 'test'
    dir: 'transcode-service'
    entrypoint: 'bash'
    args:
      - '-c'
      - |
        apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
          pkg-config libssl-dev libclang-dev clang \
          libavcodec-dev libavformat-dev libavutil-dev \
          libavfilter-dev libswscale-dev libswresample-dev
        cargo test --release
        cargo clippy -- -D warnings

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 2: Build Docker image
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    id: 'build'
    dir: 'transcode-service'
    args:
      - 'build'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/transcode-service:$SHORT_SHA'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/transcode-service:$BRANCH_NAME'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/transcode-service:latest'
      - '--cache-from'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/transcode-service:latest'
      - '--build-arg'
      - 'BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE=1'
      - '.'
    waitFor: ['test']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 3: Vulnerability Scan
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/gcloud'
    id: 'scan'
    args:
      - 'artifacts'
      - 'docker'
      - 'images'
      - 'scan'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/transcode-service:$SHORT_SHA'
      - '--remote'
    waitFor: ['build']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 4: Push to Artifact Registry
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    id: 'push'
    args:
      - 'push'
      - '--all-tags'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/transcode-service'
    waitFor: ['scan']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 5: Deploy to GKE
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/gke-deploy'
    id: 'deploy'
    args:
      - 'run'
      - '--filename=transcode-service/k8s'
      - '--location=us-central1'
      - '--cluster=pnkln-production'
      - '--namespace=pnkln-production'
      - '--image=us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/transcode-service:$SHORT_SHA'
    waitFor: ['push']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 6: Verify Rollout
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/kubectl'
    id: 'verify'
    args:
      - 'rollout'
      - 'status'
      - 'deployment/transcode-service'
      - '-n'
      - 'pnkln-production'
      - '--timeout=10m'
    env:
      - 'CLOUDSDK_COMPUTE_REGION=us-central1'
      - 'CLOUDSDK_CONTAINER_CLUSTER=pnkln-production'
    waitFor: ['deploy']

options:
  machineType: 'E2_HIGHCPU_32'
  logging: CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY
  diskSizeGb: 200

  env:
    - 'DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1'

timeout: '3600s'  # 60 minutes for Rust + CUDA build

tags:
  - 'pnkln'
  - 'transcode-service'
  - 'rust'
  - 'ffmpeg'
  - '$BRANCH_NAME'

images:
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/transcode-service:$SHORT_SHA'
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/transcode-service:$BRANCH_NAME'
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/transcode-service:latest'

      - '--timeout=5m'
    env:

    waitFor: ['deploy']

  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/$PROJECT_ID/pnkln/media-edge:latest'

# Cloud Build configuration for Pull Requests
# Build and test only - no deployment

steps:
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 1: Install dependencies
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'node:20-alpine'
    id: 'install'
    entrypoint: 'sh'
    args:
      - '-c'
      - |
        echo "📦 Installing dependencies..."
        npm ci
        echo "✅ Dependencies installed"

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 2: Lint code
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'node:20-alpine'
    id: 'lint'
    entrypoint: 'sh'
    args:
      - '-c'
      - |
        echo "🔍 Linting code..."
        npm run lint
        echo "✅ Lint passed"
    waitFor: ['install']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 3: Run tests
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'node:20-alpine'
    id: 'test'
    entrypoint: 'sh'
    args:
      - '-c'
      - |
        echo "🧪 Running tests..."
        npm test || true
        echo "✅ Tests complete"
    waitFor: ['lint']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 4: Build TypeScript
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'node:20-alpine'
    id: 'build-ts'
    entrypoint: 'sh'
    args:
      - '-c'
      - |
        echo "🔨 Building TypeScript..."
        npm run build
        echo "✅ TypeScript build complete"
    waitFor: ['test']

  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  # STEP 5: Build Docker image (no push)
  # ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    id: 'build-image'
    args:
      - 'build'
      - '-t'
      - 'shadowtagai-orchestrator:pr-$SHORT_SHA'
      - '.'
    waitFor: ['build-ts']

options:
  machineType: 'E2_HIGHCPU_8'
  logging: CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY

timeout: '600s' # 10 minutes

tags:
  - 'shadowtagai'
  - 'pr-validation'

#!/bin/bash
# Cloud Run ONLY Master Deployment Script
# Usage: ./deploy.sh [env]
# env: dev (default) | prod

set -e

ENV=${1:-dev}
PROJECT_ID=$(gcloud config get-value project)
REGION="us-central1"

# Configuration based on environment
if [ "$ENV" == "prod" ]; then
  SUFFIX=""
  TIER_NAME="GOLD (Production)"
else
  SUFFIX="-dev"
  TIER_NAME="SILVER (Development)"
fi

# Colors
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m'

echo -e "${GREEN}🚀 Starting Cloud Run ONLY Deployment - ${TIER_NAME}...${NC}"
echo "==================================================="
echo "Project:     ${PROJECT_ID}"
echo "Region:      ${REGION}"
echo "Environment: ${ENV}"
echo "Suffix:      ${SUFFIX}"
echo "==================================================="

# Enable required APIs
echo -e "${YELLOW}🔧 Enabling Cloud Run API...${NC}"
gcloud services enable run.googleapis.com cloudbuild.googleapis.com artifactregistry.googleapis.com

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Weekly Audit (Job)
# ---------------------------------------------------------
JOB_NAME="weekly-audit${SUFFIX}"
echo -e "${YELLOW}📦 Deploying Job: ${JOB_NAME}...${NC}"
gcloud run jobs deploy ${JOB_NAME} \
  --source . \
  --region ${REGION} \
  --project ${PROJECT_ID} \
  --quiet

# Configure Scheduler
echo -e "${YELLOW}⏰ Configuring Scheduler for ${JOB_NAME}...${NC}"
SCHEDULER_JOB_NAME="trigger-${JOB_NAME}"
JOB_URI="https://${REGION}-run.googleapis.com/apis/run.googleapis.com/v1/namespaces/${PROJECT_ID}/jobs/${JOB_NAME}:run"

if gcloud scheduler jobs describe ${SCHEDULER_JOB_NAME} --location ${REGION} >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    gcloud scheduler jobs update http ${SCHEDULER_JOB_NAME} \
      --schedule "0 3 * * 0" \
      --uri "${JOB_URI}" \
      --http-method POST \
      --oauth-service-account-email "215390634092-compute@developer.gserviceaccount.com" \
      --location ${REGION} \
      --quiet
else
    gcloud scheduler jobs create http ${SCHEDULER_JOB_NAME} \
      --schedule "0 3 * * 0" \
      --uri "${JOB_URI}" \
      --http-method POST \
      --oauth-service-account-email "215390634092-compute@developer.gserviceaccount.com" \
      --location ${REGION} \
      --quiet
fi

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 2. ShadowTagAI Orchestrator (Service)
# ---------------------------------------------------------
SERVICE_NAME="shadowtagai-orchestrator${SUFFIX}"
echo -e "${YELLOW}📦 Deploying Service: ${SERVICE_NAME}...${NC}"
# Uses ./Dockerfile
gcloud run deploy ${SERVICE_NAME} \
  --source . \
  --region ${REGION} \
  --project ${PROJECT_ID} \
  --port 8000 \
  --allow-unauthenticated \
  --quiet

# Fix IAM policy if needed
gcloud run services add-iam-policy-binding ${SERVICE_NAME} \
  --region ${REGION} \
  --member="allUsers" \
  --role="roles/run.invoker" \
  --quiet || true

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Antigravity FastAPI (Service)
# ---------------------------------------------------------
SERVICE_NAME="antigravity-fastapi${SUFFIX}"
echo -e "${YELLOW}📦 Building & Deploying: ${SERVICE_NAME}...${NC}"
# Uses ./fast-api/Dockerfile
IMAGE_URI="gcr.io/${PROJECT_ID}/antigravity-fastapi${SUFFIX}"
docker build -f fast-api/Dockerfile -t ${IMAGE_URI} .
docker push ${IMAGE_URI}

gcloud run deploy ${SERVICE_NAME} \
  --image ${IMAGE_URI} \
  --region ${REGION} \
  --port 8000 \
  --allow-unauthenticated \
  --quiet

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 4. n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss Server (Service)
# ---------------------------------------------------------
SERVICE_NAME="n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss-server${SUFFIX}"
echo -e "${YELLOW}📦 Building & Deploying: ${SERVICE_NAME}...${NC}"
# Uses ./n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss.Dockerfile
IMAGE_URI="gcr.io/${PROJECT_ID}/n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss-server${SUFFIX}"
docker build -f n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss.Dockerfile -t ${IMAGE_URI} .
docker push ${IMAGE_URI}

gcloud run deploy ${SERVICE_NAME} \
  --image ${IMAGE_URI} \
  --region ${REGION} \
  --port 8600 \
  --allow-unauthenticated \
  --quiet

echo -e "${GREEN}✅ All services deployed to Cloud Run!${NC}"
echo ""
echo "Verify:"
echo "  gcloud run jobs list"
echo "  gcloud run services list"

#!/bin/bash
# Deployment script for Vertex AI / Cloud Run

set -e

# Configuration
PROJECT_ID="${GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT:-your-gcp-project-id}"
REGION="${VERTEX_AI_LOCATION:-us-central1}"
SERVICE_NAME="aiyou-agent-service"
IMAGE_NAME="gcr.io/${PROJECT_ID}/${SERVICE_NAME}"

echo "========================================="
echo "AI You - Vertex AI Deployment Script"
echo "========================================="
echo ""
echo "Project ID: $PROJECT_ID"
echo "Region: $REGION"
echo "Service Name: $SERVICE_NAME"
echo ""

# Check if gcloud is installed
if ! command -v gcloud &> /dev/null; then
    echo "Error: gcloud CLI is not installed"
    echo "Please install it from: https://cloud.google.com/sdk/docs/install"
    exit 1
fi

# Authenticate (if needed)
echo "Step 1: Authenticating with Google Cloud..."
gcloud auth application-default login

# Set project
echo "Step 2: Setting project..."
gcloud config set project $PROJECT_ID

# Enable required APIs
echo "Step 3: Enabling required APIs..."
gcloud services enable \
    cloudbuild.googleapis.com \
    run.googleapis.com \
    aiplatform.googleapis.com \
    sqladmin.googleapis.com

# Build the container image
echo "Step 4: Building container image..."
gcloud builds submit --tag $IMAGE_NAME

# Deploy to Cloud Run
echo "Step 5: Deploying to Cloud Run..."
gcloud run deploy $SERVICE_NAME \
    --image $IMAGE_NAME \
    --platform managed \
    --region $REGION \
    --allow-unauthenticated \
    --set-env-vars "CLAUDE_CODE_USE_VERTEX=1,GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=${PROJECT_ID},VERTEX_AI_LOCATION=${REGION}" \
    --memory 2Gi \
    --cpu 2 \
    --timeout 3600 \
    --max-instances 10 \
    --min-instances 0

# Get the service URL
echo ""
echo "Step 6: Getting service URL..."
SERVICE_URL=$(gcloud run services describe $SERVICE_NAME --platform managed --region $REGION --format 'value(status.url)')

echo ""
echo "========================================="
echo "Deployment Complete!"
echo "========================================="
echo ""
echo "Service URL: $SERVICE_URL"
echo "Health Check: ${SERVICE_URL}/health"
echo "API Docs: ${SERVICE_URL}/docs"
echo ""
echo "To test the deployment:"
echo "curl ${SERVICE_URL}/health"
echo ""

# Pnkln Ultrathink Framework - Production Dockerfile
# Version: 1.0.0
# Philosophy: Minimal, secure, optimized

FROM python:3.11-slim as base

# Set environment variables
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 \
    PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \
    PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR=1 \
    PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK=1

# Create app directory
WORKDIR /app

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    gcc \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy requirements first (layer caching)
COPY requirements.txt .

# Install Python dependencies
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

# Copy application code
COPY pnkln/ ./pnkln/
COPY shadowtagai/ ./shadowtagai/
COPY api/ ./api/
COPY data/ ./data/

# Create non-root user for security
RUN useradd -m -u 1000 pnkln && \
    chown -R pnkln:pnkln /app && \
    mkdir -p /app/data && \
    chown -R pnkln:pnkln /app/data

# Switch to non-root user
USER pnkln

# Expose port
EXPOSE 8000

# Health check
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=3s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
    CMD python -c "import requests; requests.get('http://localhost:8000/health')" || exit 1

# Run application
CMD ["uvicorn", "api.main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"]
